heading: Mandates
body:
The mandate that MongoDB registers on your behalf permits MongoDB to
charge your credit card up to $1,400 USD (United States Dollars) per month. This might be
presented by your card issuer or bank in INR (Indian Rupees) instead of USD (United States Dollars).

MongoDB charges your credit card for your usage only. The $1,400
mandate is a limit on the amount you can be charged per month.

You manage your mandates through your card issuer or bank. When you
[add a payment method](add-method-payment-processing-india) or
[retry a payment](retry-payment-processing-india) with a credit
card from a credit card issuer based in India, according to RBI (Reserve Bank of India)
regulations, your card issuer or bank provides a
link to manage your mandates.
